home.title: Zuki Apps - Smart Mobile Applications
home.description: Discover innovative mobile applications designed to simplify your daily life
home.heroSubtitle: Creating smart, intuitive mobile applications that make life easier

zulist.title: ZuList - Smart Shopping List
zulist.description: A Flutter-based shopping list application with real-time collaboration, offline support, and smart product recommendations
zulist.fullDescription: ZuList is a modern shopping list app designed to make grocery shopping easier and more collaborative. Create shared lists with family and friends, get smart product suggestions, and manage your shopping efficiently - even offline.

features.title: Key Features
features.realtimeDesc: Share lists with family and friends, see updates instantly as they happen
features.offlineDesc: Works seamlessly even without internet connection, syncs when you're back online
features.smartDesc: AI-powered recommendations to help you find products faster
features.multilangDesc: Available in English and Hebrew with full RTL support
features.firebaseDesc: Secure cloud sync with Firebase for reliable data storage
features.profileDesc: Optimized profile images and user management
features.categoriesDesc: Organize your shopping by categories for better efficiency
